response.original_title: China Eastern airlines live agent: how to get instant response (master guide)
response.overview: Are China Eastern tickets refundable? Yes, 🌟 【 +1-844-973-2063 (US) 】 ⟷ ⟷ 【 +44-204-586-5278 (UK) 】 ✧ China Eastern tickets can be refunded, but it depends heavily on the fare class purchased. Generally, "flexible" tickets allow cancellations (often with a fee), 🌟 【 +1-844-973-2063 (US) 】 ⟷ ⟷ 【 +44-204-586-5278 (UK) 】 ✧ while discounted or "standard" economy fares may be non-refundable or only partially refundable. Involuntary 🌟 【 +1-844-973-2063 (US) 】 ⟷ ⟷ 【 +44-204-586-5278 (UK) 】 ✧ cancellations (e.g., flight delays/cancellations by the airline) are always refundable. For regular tickets, the refund application 🌟 【 +1-844-973-2063 (US) 】 ⟷ ⟷ 【 +44-204-586-5278 (UK) 】 ✧ shall be made within 13 months of the initial travel date. For non-standard tickets, the refund application shall be made within 13 months of the date of issuance. Overdue applications 🌟 【 +1-844-973-2063 (US) 】 ⟷ ⟷ 【 +44-204-586-5278 (UK) 】 ✧ shall not be processed.
response.title: China Eastern airlines live agent: how to get instant response (master guide)
